assumptions.text: Client will provide timely access to financial records, management accounts, board materials, and relevant internal stakeholders throughout the engagement.
Client will share relevant internal documents — including prior-year accounts, existing reporting packs, and cap table — required for diagnosis and roadmap development.
Project scope, timeline, and pricing are based on the information provided in the initial brief. Material changes to scope, company complexity, or strategic context may require a revised proposal.
Travel and accommodation expenses, if required for on-site work, will be billed at cost with prior client approval. Remote delivery is the default where feasible.

All parties will maintain strict confidentiality regarding engagement details, financial information, and strategic advice. Start to Scale Financial Management will not disclose the engagement or client identity without prior written consent.
Timelines assume client review and approval of deliverables within 5 business days of submission. Delays in client feedback may affect overall project timelines.

disclaimers.text: Projected outcomes and improvement trajectories described in this proposal are based on professional judgment and comparable engagements. Actual outcomes depend on the company's specific circumstances, execution capacity, and market conditions.
This proposal is valid for 30 days from the date of submission. After this period, pricing and availability are subject to reconfirmation.
References to third-party tools, systems, or service providers are based on independent professional assessment and do not constitute a commercial endorsement.

legalTerms.title: Intellectual Property
legalTerms.text: All deliverables created specifically for this engagement become the client's property upon final payment. Start to Scale Financial Management retains ownership of pre-existing methodologies, frameworks, and tools, granting the client a perpetual, non-exclusive licence for internal use.

legalTerms.title: Confidentiality
legalTerms.text: Both parties agree to maintain strict confidentiality of all proprietary and sensitive information disclosed during the engagement, including financial data, strategic advice, and internal communications. This obligation survives for 5 years following engagement completion.

legalTerms.title: Limitation of Liability
legalTerms.text: Start to Scale Financial Management's total aggregate liability under this engagement shall not exceed two times (2x) the total fees paid. Neither party shall be liable for indirect, consequential, incidental, or punitive damages.

legalTerms.title: Termination
legalTerms.text: Either party may terminate this engagement with 14 calendar days' written notice. Upon termination, the client shall pay for all work completed to date. Deliverables produced to date shall be transferred to the client.

legalTerms.title: Change Management
legalTerms.text: Changes to project scope, timeline, or deliverables require a written change order agreed by both parties. Change orders will specify the impact on fees, timeline, and deliverables.

legalTerms.title: Contracting Entity
legalTerms.text: Services are provided by Duke Strategy & Corporate Affairs B.V. (KvK 95849696, VAT NL867341737B01), trading as Start to Scale Financial Management, headquartered in Amersfoort, Netherlands.
